responsibilities: Develop and validate pricing models for derivatives, fixed income, and structured products under varying market conditions
Conduct stress testing and scenario analysis to quantify portfolio exposure under extreme market and macroeconomic events
Build Value at Risk and Expected Shortfall models to support enterprise-wide risk reporting and regulatory compliance
Collaborate with traders and risk managers to calibrate models against live market data and observed pricing discrepancies
Document model assumptions, limitations, and validation results to satisfy internal audit and regulatory examination requirements
Automate daily risk and P&L attribution reports using Python scripts integrated with internal trading systems
Perform model validation and independent review of front-office pricing models to ensure compliance with risk policy
Analyze yield curves, credit spreads, and volatility surfaces to support trading desk hedging and risk decisions
